node.content-desc: Amazon Basics Vacuum Storage Bags, Compression Space Saving for Clothes and Linens, Reusable with Hand Pump, Large, Clear, 5-Pack Amazon Basics Vacuum Storage Bags, Compression Space Saving ... 4.3 out of 5 stars 94229 ratings 1,221.71 (INR 243.97/count)
Amazon Basics Vacuum Storage Bags, Compression Space Saving for Clothes and Linens, Reusable with Hand Pump, Large, Clear, 5-Pack

node.text: Amazon Basics Vacuum Storage Bags, Compression Space Saving ...

node.content-desc: Report an issue with this product or seller

node.text: Report an issue with this product or seller
Special FeatureDurable, Foldable, Handle, Large Capacity, Sturdy, Waterproof
✔️ Extra Large: 27'' x 14'' x 15'' and up to 24 Gallon volume, an alternative for moving box and organizer, holiday storage bag. Waterproof, ideal for space saving, moving, camping
✔️ Heavy-Duty: Made with premium PE material with wide and thick carrying handles surround the luggage/bag, giving the moving bags much more strength to hold heavier loading than stitched handles
✔️ Open Top: The top side of the storage bag can be fully opened and it is much easier to organize, load and unload clothes, books, or anything that you want to put in
✔️ Easy Storage: Foldable materials, just fold and put them away into shelves, or anywhere, they will take no much space to store when not in use
✔️ Tag Pocket: A tag pocket is on the top-right corner with which you can mark your luggage for easier recognizing

node.text: A tag pocket on the top-right corner of the front side of the bag, you can tag what is inside of the bag.
Made with premium PE material which is waterproof and moisture-proof. Note:The whole bag is not completely waterproof due to the zipper and stitching.
Our moving bag features a durable zipper designed to withstand heavy loads and frequent use, ensuring your belongings stay secure during any move.
Our bag is foldable, you can easily fold them and store them into you shelf or anywhere, they will not take much space.
Heavy Duty Moving Bag Buying Options
Heavy Duty Moving Bag Buying Options
Heavy Duty Moving Bag Buying Options
Perfect for moving into dorms, our bag’s large capacity makes packing and unpacking easy.

node.content-desc: Customer reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 44,321 global ratings

node.text: Customers find these moving bags excellent for college moves and dorm packing, appreciating their huge size, durability, and strong handles that keep items dry. They hold a lot of weight and offer good value for money. The zipper strength receives mixed feedback - while some find them durable, others report that they break almost immediately.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews

node.content-desc: Positive aspect, holds a lot, 1410 mentions
Positive aspect, value for money, 643 mentions

Top reviews from the United States
Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026
Very sturdy, used to pack bedding and clothing
Reviewed in the United States on January 23, 2026

Second time I'm buying these moving bags - this time for myself! First time I bought them for my daughter moving out of her apartment. They are perfect for linens, towels, clothing, bedding, etc. They are big enough to fit a full-sized comforter and sheets, pillows and...
Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2026
Sturdy bags that hold a large amount of items and are still easy to carry ! Great for towels, sheets, clothes, blankets , pillows
Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2026
Worked out great for moving. Expandable, sturdy, and held more than I thought. Used them over and over.
Good Heavy Duty Moving Bags with Strap Handles and End Handles
Reviewed in the United States on January 7, 2026

I like these bags overall. Getting them closed is a bit hard with my old fingers that do not work well. Specifically trying to get the zipper to go around the corners is tough. I did appreciate the tabs on the zipper ends that made it a little easier. Once closed they...
Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026
Love these bags! Very sturdy. Like the position of the zipper for easy packing. Used for travel.
Flexible bags for moving and storage
Reviewed in the United States on January 23, 2026

These were perfect for a difficult move. I needed to transfer a year of my life back to a rebuilt home. They held a lot, both clothes and household goods. They were easy to lift or drag. They fit into odd shaped places. I could lift them myself. As I gradually...
Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026

I’m a foster parent with kids coming and going all the time from my house with their belongings. These bags are awesome for when you need to quickly pack up their items for kids to move homes and are much better than plastic garbage bags for many reasons. They are durable...
Llegaron muchísimo antes de lo esperado, tienen gran capacidad, buen material, resistentes. Las recomiendo
Bought two packs for my son in university. Very handy. Fits a lot. Durable. I wish it came in black or grey.
Products arrived later than estimated. However, products meet my expectation.

Huge, strong bags that have double zippers and great handles. No odor. They won’t bear a of weight (don’t haul rocks), but they will hold large quantities of toys, lego, pots/pans, Xmas decorations, clothing or quilts. There’s a place to insert a contents slip. Somewhat...
Very strong and lots of space

Got these for my move back in September. Was a bit wary it would hold alot or the draw strings would break. Ended up fitting 85% of my things in 5 of these, and was such a relief when I finally ended up moving. They fit a TON! and are very easy to carry. Highly recommend.
How customer reviews and ratings work
Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.
